comments.text:
## Revised plan: centralize repo-root derivation

The fix is in repo.go, not main.go. Repo owns the git directory concept.

There's already a repoDir() method (line 403) but three call sites bypass it. The work:

1. Fix findGitDir() — swap --git-dir for --git-common-dir
2. Consolidate internal callers — ForceReinit (line 95), remoteBranchExists (line 209), and derivePrefix (line 230) should all go through repoDir() instead of filepath.Dir(r.GitDir) directly
3. Export RepoDir() — rename the method so gitUserName in helpers.go can use it instead of taking GitDir and deriving the path itself

After this, repo-root derivation exists in exactly two places: FindRepo() (before struct creation) and RepoDir() (after).
